Projects

// things I built to learn by doing

Database Design for an E-Commerce Store

A fully normalized relational schema for products, customers, orders, and payments — with proper joins, indexing, and key constraints.

MySQLER DiagramNormalization
GitHub ↗

Inventory Management System

A relational database tracking inventory, suppliers, stock, and orders, with CRUD operations and aggregate queries for real reporting.

MySQL WorkbenchCRUD

Blacksort Pro X — Smart File Sorting

A file management app that automatically sorts and categorizes files, focused on automation and a clean interface.

PythonAutomation

Space Dodge — Arcade Survival Game

A browser-based 2D survival game with real-time collision detection and score tracking, tuned for smooth cross-platform play.

PythonPygameFlask

Predictive Analytics Using Historical Data

A forecasting model that mines historical data for trends and seasonality to predict future outcomes, with cleaning, feature engineering, and evaluation baked in.

PythonPandasForecasting
GitHub ↗

Customer Segmentation Project

Clustering customers by behavior and demographics to uncover distinct segments — turning raw transaction data into targetable groups for marketing decisions.

PythonClusteringEDA
GitHub ↗

Sales Revenue Analysis Dashboard

An interactive dashboard breaking down sales revenue by product, region, and time period, built during the Thiranex internship for real business reporting.

Power BISQLDashboarding
GitHub ↗

Virtual Lab Intern Project

A virtual lab simulation built during an internship, letting users run and observe experiments interactively without physical equipment.

JavaScriptSimulation
GitHub ↗

YuvaIntern AI Trainee Projects

A collection of AI trainee assignments and mini-projects completed during the YuvaIntern internship, spanning core ML and applied AI tasks.

PythonMachine Learning
GitHub ↗

Digital Civic Portal — Smart India Hackathon

Built with teammate Prateek Vijay for SIH — lets citizens report civic issues (roads, lighting, sanitation) with photos and precise location, and gives officers a dashboard to track and resolve complaints transparently.

SIHFull-StackTeam Project
